StructurePhase.Reference: Savitskii E.M., Polyakova V.P., Urvachev V.P., Russ. Metall. (Engl. Transl.) p192 (1980)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: NO. LPF Collection Code: 526644. Melting Point: 1923 K. Sample Preparation: STARTING MATERIALS:Pd,Sc. Compound Preparation: arc-melted. CRUCIBLE: copper hearth. ATMOSPHERE: argon. Sample annealed at 0.8-0.9 melting temperature for 48 h in evacuated tube, slowly cooled. Article Title: AN INVESTIGATION OF THE POLYTHERMAL PdIn-PdSc CROSS-SECTION. Minor Warning: No e.s.d reported/abstracted on the cell dimension. No R factor reported/abstracted. Wyckoff Sequence: b a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.
